prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约7169名、8576名、7867名、7951名、8584名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021年至2022年大幅后移约1400名，2023年小幅回升至7867名，2024年基本持平于7951名，2025年再次后移至8584名，近2年累计后移约600名。2025年基准位次为8584名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为216人，2025年缩减至212人，2026年进一步缩减至207人，较2025年减少5人（约-2.4%），连续两年小幅缩招，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2024年均为第8名，2025–2026年降至第9名，仍稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏正面，主要涉及食堂品质（全国高校食堂排名第一）和新闻传播学科排名前列等积极信号；抖音热度总排名第22位（较热），2021年曾排名第2（高热），整体关注度较高；历年无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理稳定；第五轮学科评估中，A+学科3个（光学工程、机械工程、电气工程），A学科6个（动力工程及工程热物理、材料科学与工程、物理学、控制科学与工程、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术），A-学科8个（临床医学、公共卫生与预防医学、化学、基础医学、工商管理、新闻传播学、生物医学工程、生物学），A-及以上共17个，学科实力雄厚，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程、临床医学等热门专业社会热度持续偏高；浙江省考生总数从2025年约29.08万人增至2026年约40万人（+37.5%），竞争环境显著加剧；华中科技大学位于湖北省武汉市，在浙江省属跨省招生；2025年在浙江省招生212人，占该校总招生计划比例较小，属典型的外省招生格局；浙江省考生对省外顶尖985高校报考意愿较强，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩减（-5人）、浙江省考生总数大幅增加（+37.5%）、学校声誉正面且抖音关注度较热、学科实力强劲等多重因素，竞争加剧是主导方向。在2025年基准位次8584名基础上，经，预测2026年最低录取位次约8713名，波动区间8213–9213名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（同济医学院）
- 电气工程及其自动化（电气AI启明实验班）
- 电子信息类（集成电路启明实验班）
- 计算机类（计算机学院）
- 光电信息科学与工程。

- 机器人工程
- 自动化类
- 法学
- 机械类
- 工商管理类
- 新闻传播学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 数学类
- 物理学类
- 能源动力类
- 材料类
- 化学类
- 生物科学类
- 口腔医学（同济医学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8713名，区间8213–9213名。建议位次在区间内考生以二档专业为主力填报（如自动化类、机械类、电气工程及其自动化），一档专业（临床医学、计算机类、光电等）可作为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限（<8213名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>9213名）建议以三档专业保底，同时关注其他同层次高校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were approximately 7169, 8576, 7867, 7951, and 8584, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, there was a significant backward shift of about 1400 places; in 2023, it slightly recovered to 7867; in 2024, it remained basically flat at 7951; in 2025, it shifted backward again to 8584, with a cumulative backward shift of about 600 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 8584. The enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Comprehensive category was 216 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 212 in 2025, and further reduced to 207 in 2026, a decrease of 5 students (about -2.4%) compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of slight enrollment reduction, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 8th from 2021 to 2024, dropped to 9th in 2025-2026, but still remains among the top universities in China. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, mainly involving positive signals such as cafeteria quality (ranked first among national university cafeterias) and the top ranking of journalism and communication disciplines. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), and it once ranked 2nd in 2021 (very hot), indicating relatively high overall attention. There have been no records of admission cutoff line gaps or crashes over the years, indicating stable application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 3 A+ disciplines (Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 6 A disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Materials Science and Engineering, Physics, Control Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology), and 8 A- disciplines (Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Chemistry, Basic Medicine, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Biomedical Engineering, Biology), totaling 17 A- and above, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity. The total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province increased from about 290,800 in 2025 to about 400,000 in 2026 (+37.5%), significantly intensifying the competitive environment. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, and recruits across provinces in Zhejiang. In 2025, it enrolled 212 students in Zhejiang, accounting for a relatively small proportion of the university's total enrollment plan, typical of an out-of-province enrollment pattern. Candidates in Zhejiang have a strong willingness to apply to top 985 universities outside the province, with no obvious regional preference deviation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-5 students), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province (+37.5%), the positive university reputation and relatively hot Douyin attention, and strong disciplinary strength, intensified competition is the dominant direction. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 8584, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 8713, with a fluctuation range of 8213 to 9213.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Tongji Medical College)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Electrical AI Qiming Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Qiming Experimental Class)
- Computer Science (School of Computer Science)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Robotics Engineering
- Automation
- Law
- Mechanical Engineering
- Business Administration
- Journalism and Communication.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Mathematics
- Physics
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Chemistry
- Biological Sciences
- Stomatology (Tongji Medical College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 8713, with a range of 8213 to 9213. It is recommended that candidates within this range focus on Tier 2 majors as their main choices (such as Automation, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation), while Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Optoelectronics, etc.) can be used as reach targets. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8213) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (>9213) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering other universities of similar level.
